column1: I can do the job alone. I don't need _____ to help me.
I opened the door, but I could see _____ .
Remember, don't tell _____ about him. It's a secret.
We can't do it. We have _____ to help us.
_____ must have been using my books. They've got all misplaced on the shelf.
I didn't know about the meeting. _____ told me.
_____ has broken the window. I don't know who.
That is a very hard question. _____ can answer it.
I saw _____ near your house yesterday. He was reading a newspaper.
